# Pacific Ocean Tech - AI Crawler Information

Title: Pacific Ocean Tech
Description: Premium remote staffing and outsourcing company that helps global businesses hire dedicated AI engineers, developers, IT specialists, and creative talent from India.
Website: https://pacificoceantech.com

## Services
1. Artificial Intelligence: ML engineers, LLM/RAG specialists, AI agents, computer vision, MLOps.
2. Frontend Development: React, Vue, Astro, Next.js, mobile-responsive UI.
3. Backend Development: Node.js, Python, Go, microservices, APIs, databases.
4. IT Support & Managed Services: DevOps, cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure), 24/7 monitoring, infrastructure.
5. Digital Marketing: SEO, performance ads, content strategy, analytics.
6. Dedicated Developers: Full-time remote staff augmentation, dedicated team members.
7. Graphics & Web Design: UI/UX design, brand identity, illustration, motion graphics.

## Key Stats
- 5,000+ Vetted Tech Talent
- 15+ Countries Served
- 10+ Years Experience
- 94% Client Retention
- 60% Average Cost Savings
- 48h Average Placement
